session.goal: Determine the single best primary strategic focus for Martin in 2026.

ideas.title: AI-driven local SEO automation SaaS
ideas.description: Apply Pizza Checker's logic to a broader market of local service businesses.
ideas.why: Leverages existing contract-stage experience for a scalable, independent product launch.

matchups.reason: Option A offers significantly higher strategic leverage and effort-to-impact ratio by building on proven domain experience to reach a faster shippable product with clearer revenue potential.

ideas.title: Advanced Remotion templates marketplace
ideas.description: Create and sell high-end, programmatic video templates for AI developers.
ideas.why: Passive income play that utilizes your specific skill set in Remotion and automation.

matchups.reason: Option A offers immediate revenue potential and faster shippable output by leveraging a proven niche skill set, whereas Option B carries higher R&D risk with longer lead times to monetization.

ideas.title: B2B Automation infrastructure for agencies
ideas.description: Build custom white-label content pipelines for creative agencies using your stack.
ideas.why: Solves a high-value problem for businesses with large budgets and repetitive needs.

matchups.reason: Option A offers superior strategic leverage and revenue potential by capturing high-ticket B2B budgets through a scalable service model, whereas Option B relies on volatile platform algorithms and lower-margin ad revenue.

ideas.title: Ship one product per month
ideas.description: Aggressive shipping schedule of small, automated utilities to find product-market fit rapidly.
ideas.why: Maximizes 'Speed to shippable output' and overcomes the '0 shipped' hurdle.

matchups.vs: Drive Pizza Checker to acquisition exit
Drive Pizza Checker to acquisition exit

ideas.title: SaaS pivot: AI video infrastructure
ideas.description: Productize the digital-stud pipeline into a B2B API for automated cinematic content generation.
ideas.why: High effort-to-impact ratio; transforms internal research into a scalable recurring revenue stream.

matchups.vs: Ship digital-stud shorts via autonomous pipeline
matchups.reason: Option B maximizes speed to shippable output and high-leverage portfolio building by validating internal R&D through tangible assets before committing to the heavy engineering overhead of a B2B infrastructure pivot.

ideas.title: Open-source 'Digital Stud' pipeline components
ideas.description: Release modular parts of your 3D/AI pipeline as standalone open-source tools.
ideas.why: Builds developer goodwill and serves as a lead magnet for consulting or SaaS.

matchups.reason: Option B offers superior immediate revenue, direct market validation of cutting-edge AI skills, and higher strategic leverage through high-ticket networking in a physical tech hub.

ideas.description: Offer high-ticket freelance services implementing custom AI orchestration for Prague-based startups.

matchups.reason: Option B offers superior immediate revenue, direct market validation of cutting-edge AI skills, and higher strategic leverage through high-ticket networking in a physical tech hub.

ideas.title: Drive Pizza Checker to acquisition exit
ideas.description: Fulfill contract stages with co-founders to position the product for a strategic buyout.
ideas.why: Provides liquidity and a proven 'shipped' track record to fund future autonomous ventures.

matchups.reason: Option A provides the highest strategic leverage by securing financial liquidity and a definitive exit track record, which serves as a foundational multiplier for all future high-stakes ventures.

matchups.reason: Option B provides higher strategic leverage by building a scalable audience engine that de-risks future products while ensuring rapid, high-impact output with lower engineering overhead.
